allow: Bash(cd /d/Projects/SecondBrain && npx prisma migrate dev --name init 2>&1)
Bash(cd /d/Projects/SecondBrain && DATABASE_URL="file:./dev.db" npx prisma migrate dev --name init 2>&1)
Bash(cd /d/Projects/SecondBrain && DATABASE_URL="file:./dev.db" TEST_USER_ID="test-user-id-0000" npx tsx prisma/seed.ts 2>&1)
Bash(cd /d/Projects/SecondBrain && DATABASE_URL="file:./dev.db" TEST_AUTH=true TEST_USER_ID="test-user-id-0000" npx playwright test --reporter=list 2>&1)
Bash(cd /d/Projects/SecondBrain && DATABASE_URL="file:./dev.db" TEST_AUTH=true TEST_USER_ID="test-user-id-0000" npx playwright test tests/today.spec.ts --reporter=list 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.Name -like '*electron*' -or $_.Name -like '*dictation*'} | Select-Object Name, Id, Path")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "
\\$path = 'D:\\Projects\\SecondBrain\\dictation-app\\main.js'
\\$c = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\(\\$path\)
\\$old1 = \\"  // Write to clipboard unconditionally\\`r\\`n  const prevClipboard = clipboard.readText\(\);\\`r\\`n  clipboard.writeText\(finalText\);\\"
\\$new1 = \\"  // Always write to clipboard so Ctrl+V works as a fallback if focus was lost\\`r\\`n  clipboard.writeText\(finalText\);\\"
\\$old2 = \\"        // Restore previous clipboard after a brief delay\\`r\\`n        setTimeout\(\(\) => clipboard.writeText\(prevClipboard\), 800\);\\"
\\$new2 = \\"        // Transcript intentionally left in clipboard — Ctrl+V still works if auto-paste missed focus\\"
\\$c2 = \\$c.Replace\(\\$old1, \\$new1\).Replace\(\\$old2, \\$new2\)
if \(\\$c2 -eq \\$c\) {
  Write-Host 'CRLF replace failed, trying LF'
  \\$old1 = \\"  // Write to clipboard unconditionally\\`n  const prevClipboard = clipboard.readText\(\);\\`n  clipboard.writeText\(finalText\);\\"
  \\$old2 = \\"        // Restore previous clipboard after a brief delay\\`n        setTimeout\(\(\) => clipboard.writeText\(prevClipboard\), 800\);\\"
  \\$c2 = \\$c.Replace\(\\$old1, \\$new1\).Replace\(\\$old2, \\$new2\)
}
if \(\\$c2.Contains\('prevClipboard'\)\) { Write-Host 'FAILED: still contains prevClipboard'; exit 1 }
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\(\\$path, \\$c2\)
Write-Host 'SUCCESS'
" 2>&1)
